event_comments:
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Lost and Found note published on source page: One men’s and one child’s blue hooded windbreakers, pink fleece jacket, stakes and rope from a team canopy, and a runner’s belt with pocket.
Result status codes: MSP = missing punch; DNF = did not finish; NC = not competing; DQ = disqualified; OVT = overtime; DNS = did not start.
Source note: a starred time indicates course completion status was not reported and may be valid, MSP, or DNF.
Team-standings sections are captured as top-level school-team rows only; member contribution subrows are not repeated.
cumulative_event_comments:
This event is posted to UsynligO. Rerun your course or run another course!
LiveLox is posted. Upload your tracking!
Lost and Found: One men’s and one child’s blue hooded windbreakers, pink fleece jacket, stakes and rope from a team canopy, and a runner’s belt with pocket. Please email info@cascadeoc.org to claim your item.
Course Designer(s): Eric Jones, Course Consultant: Cynthia Bartok

Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
